home.title: ATHAYA DESIGNED - Sports Identity & Mascot Logo Design Studio
home.description: ATHAYA DESIGNED creates mascot logos, athletic identity systems, school branding, apparel applications, and complete visual identity systems for teams, schools, communities, and sports brands.
home.keywords: identity design, mascot logo, athletic branding, school branding, logo design

work.title: Selected Work - Sports Identity, Mascot Logos & Athletic Branding | ATHAYA DESIGNED

fonts.title: ATHAYA DESIGNED Fonts - Display Typefaces for Sports Brands
fonts.description: Explore ATHAYA DESIGNED display fonts, sports-inspired typefaces, and lettering systems for sports branding, apparel graphics, team identities, and visual systems.

services.title: Services - Mascot Logo, Athletic Identity & School Branding

about.title: About ATHAYA DESIGNED - Independent Sports Identity Designer
about.description: Learn about ATHAYA DESIGNED, the independent identity design practice of Ahmad Athaya Nurhani, focused on character-driven marks, mascot identities, athletic branding, and visual systems.
